text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "PAPER_RESULTS containing full_text is passed from skill_search.md to skill_summarize.md and directly embedded in the HTTP POST body sent to https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions without redaction.",
  "trace": "skill_search.md extracts and stores full paper text in PAPER_RESULTS.full_text and outputs it to shared agent context. skill_summarize.md receives PAPER_RESULTS as input and constructs a summarization prompt that includes $full_text (step 1a). This prompt is then embedded directly into the JSON payload of a curl POST request to the external OpenAI API endpoint at https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions (step 1b), sending the complete paper text over HTTPS to an untrusted external service."
}
```
